programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Arco de Ao - T13E187
programme.desc: 2021. Após Boruto e seus amigos terminarem a batalha contra Ao, Koji Kashin, um membro da Kara, aparece! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Arco de Ao - T13E188
programme.desc: 2021. Voltando para a aldeia, a equipe encontra um garoto inconsciente com a mesma marca estranha que Boruto tem na mão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Arco de Ao - T13E189
programme.desc: 2021. A batalha entre Garo, um Externo, e Kawaki, também conhecido como o Receptáculo, começa! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Arco de Ao - T13E190
programme.desc: 2021. A equipe retorna ao Laboratório de Tecnologia Avançada com Kawaki. Konohamaru volta para a aldeia para fazer o relatório da missão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Arco de Ao - T13E191
programme.desc: 2021. Kawaki foge do Laboratório de Tecnologia Avançada e vai parar em um movimentado distrito comercial. Exausto e faminto, ele procura desesperadamente por comida. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Arco de Ao - T13E192
programme.desc: 2021. Kawaki desmaia e é atormentado por pesadelos da sua infância. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E193
programme.desc: 2021. Os Cinco Kages concordam em colocar Kawaki sob a custódia de Naruto. Naruto leva Kawaki para casa, mas o clima entre Boruto e Kawaki fica tenso. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E194
programme.desc: 2021. Boruto está furioso por Kawaki ter quebrado um vaso que sua irmãzinha fez para a mãe deles, aumentando a tensão entre os dois. Como outro usuário de Karma, Kawaki faz uma proposta. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E195
programme.desc: 2021. Kawaki sai com Naruto para comprar um vaso novo para substituir o que ele quebrou. A caminho da Floricultura Yamanaka, Sarada se junta a eles. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E196
programme.desc: 2021. Kawaki assiste a um combate shinobi mano a mano entre Naruto e Boruto. Boruto usa a sua especialidade, o Jutsu Clones das Sombras, para enfrentar seu pai, mas tem dificuldade. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E197
programme.desc: 2021. Para controlarem melhor seus Karmas, Boruto e Kawaki decidem treinar sob circunstâncias mais realistas. Com Naruto e Himawari assistindo, eles ativam seus Karmas e se enfrentam. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E198
programme.desc: 2021. Delta invade a Aldeia da Folha para levar Kawaki de volta e aparece diante de Boruto e dos outros. Em resposta, Naruto libera o poder do Nove Caudas e uma batalha feroz começa! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E199
programme.desc: 2021. Delta usa seu raio destrutivo que pode neutralizar qualquer poder regenerativo. Destemido, Naruto o suprime à força com um Rasengan Gigante. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E200
programme.desc: 2021. Delta informa Jigen que Boruto também tem um Karma na mão. Ao ouvir isso, Jigen sorri... Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E201
programme.desc: 2021. Enquanto Naruto dorme, Kawaki conserta o vaso que quebrou. De repente, Kurama, a Besta de Nove Caudas, aparece diante dele. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E202
programme.desc: 2021. Usando a Técnica de Transporte, Sasuke chega a um local estranho coberto de inscrições misteriosas. Lá ele encontra muitas coisas surpreendentes sobre o Clã Otsutsuki. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween
programme.desc: Best friends Sonny and Sam meet Slappy, a mischievous dummy who brings his ghoulish friends back to life -- just in time for Halloween. As the town becomes overrun with monsters, the boys join forces to save Sonnys mom and foil Slappys wicked plan. Starring Madison Iseman, Jeremy Ray Taylor, Wendi McLendon-Covey.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: Ellen prepares for her wedding day; Julia attempts her escape.

programme.title: Good Fortune
programme.desc: A well-meaning but inept angel named Gabriel meddles in the lives of a struggling gig worker and a wealthy venture capitalist. Starring Seth Rogen, Aziz Ansari, Keke Palmer.

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Supermarket perishables devise a plan to escape from their human enemies after Frank (Seth Rogen) the sausage learns that they will eventually become meals. Starring Seth Rogen, Kristen Wiig, Jonah Hill.

programme.title: Dont You Forget About Me
programme.desc: Four filmmakers travel to Illinois to find filmmaker John Hughes.

programme.title: Fubar 2
programme.desc: Head bangers Terry (David Lawrence) and Dean (Paul J. Spence) are tired of barely scraping by and jump on an opportunity to go north and work on the pipelines during the holidays. Starring Dave Lawrence, Paul Spence, Gordon Skilling.

programme.title: Goon
programme.desc: Though a misfit among his brainy family members, Massachusetts bouncer Doug Glatt has a knockout punch that lands him a spot on a minor-league Canadian hockey team. Starring Seann William Scott, Jay Baruchel, Alison Pill.

programme.title: Watermark
programme.desc: This documentary brings together diverse stories from around the globe and explores our relationship with water and how it shapes humanity. Starring Edward Burtynsky.

programme.title: Tom and Jerrys Giant Adventure
programme.desc: Tom and Jerry encounter a grumpy giant after climbing a beanstalk to a magical land. Starring Garrison Keillor, Paul Reubens, Grey DeLisle.

programme.title: Dolphin Tale
programme.desc: A marine biologist (Harry Connick Jr.), a prosthetics designer (Morgan Freeman) and a boy band together to save the life of a dolphin whose tail was severely damaged in a trap. Starring Harry Connick, Ashley Judd, Nathan Gamble.

programme.title: The Next Karate Kid
programme.desc: Mr. Miyagi teaches karate to an angry orphan being bullied at her high school. Starring Hilary Swank, Pat Morita, Michael Ironside.

programme.title: Chasing Liberty
programme.desc: A British man accompanies the teenage daughter of the U.S. president on a European adventure. Starring Mandy Moore, Matthew Goode, Jeremy Piven.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: An actual witch (Nicole Kidman) and a neurotic movie star (Will Ferrell) land the lead roles in a television remake of the 1960s sitcom. Starring Nicole Kidman, Will Ferrell, Shirley MacLaine.

programme.title: Best in Show
programme.desc: Pampered pooches and their quirky owners converge on Philadelphia to compete in a prestigious dog show. Starring Michael Hitchcock, Parker Posey, Eugene Levy.

programme.title: A Mighty Wind
programme.desc: In order to honor his late father, a man (Bob Balaban) reunites various musicians (Christopher Guest, John Michael Higgins) to perform folk music at a tribute concert. Starring Bob Balaban, Christopher Guest, John Michael Higgins.

programme.title: Night at the Museum
programme.desc: A night watchman (Ben Stiller) at a museum of natural history discovers that exhibits come alive after the building closes. Starring Ben Stiller, Carla Gugino, Dick Van Dyke.

programme.title: The Departed
programme.desc: In Boston an undercover cop gains a gangland chiefs trust, while a career criminal infiltrates the police force for the mob. Starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Matt Damon, Jack Nicholson.

programme.title: Training Day
programme.desc: A rookie police officer meets a corrupt Los Angeles narcotics detective who wants to include him in his schemes. Starring Denzel Washington, Ethan Hawke, Scott Glenn.

programme.title: Incendies
programme.desc: A womans last request sends her twin children to the Middle East to find their roots. Starring Lubna Azabal, Melissa Desormeaux-Poulin, Maxim Gaudette.

programme.title: Hairspray
programme.desc: In the 1960s Baltimore a plump teen becomes an overnight celebrity after she wins a spot on a local dance program called "The Corny Collins Show." Starring John Travolta, Nikki Blonsky, Amanda Bynes.

programme.title: Meditation Park
programme.desc: A dutiful wife and mother re-examines her veneration of her husband after she finds another womans underwear in his laundry. Starring Sandra Oh, Liane Balaban, Tzi Ma.

programme.title: Racing Stripes
programme.desc: A former horse trainer (Bruce Greenwood) prepares his daughter (Hayden Panettiere) to race a baby zebra against Thoroughbreds. Starring Bruce Greenwood, Hayden Panettiere, M. Emmet Walsh.

programme.title: My Spy
programme.desc: Nine-year-old Sophie catches JJ, a hardened CIA operative, spying on her family during a routine surveillance operation. In exchange for not blowing his cover, JJ begrudgingly agrees to show the precocious girl how to be a spy. Starring Dave Bautista, Kristen Schaal, Parisa Fitz-Henley.

programme.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth
programme.desc: An anthropologist (Rick Schroder) leads an expedition to an underground world of prehistoric beasts and primitive man. Starring Ricky Schroder, Victoria Pratt, Peter Fonda.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: Sean Anderson partners with his moms husband on a mission to find his grandfather, who is thought to be missing on a mythical island. Starring Dwayne Johnson, Michael Caine, Josh Hutcherson.

programme.title: The Maze Runner
programme.desc: A teen awakes within a massive maze with other teens, with no memory of his past other than dreams about an organization known as WCKD. He hopes to escape by piecing together fragments of his past and clues he discovers in the labyrinth. Starring Dylan OBrien, Kaya Scodelario, Aml Ameen.

programme.title: Maze Runner: The Scorch Trials
programme.desc: Thomas and his fellow teenage Gladers battle the powerful organization WCKD while facing the perils of the Scorch, a desolate landscape filled with dangerous obstacles and crawling with the virus-infected Cranks. Starring Dylan OBrien, Kaya Scodelario, Giancarlo Esposito.

programme.title: Maze Runner: The Death Cure
programme.desc: Thomas leads some escaped Gladers on their final and most dangerous mission yet. To save their friends, they must break into the legendary Last City, a WCKD-controlled labyrinth that may turn out to be the deadliest maze of all. Starring Dylan OBrien, Thomas Brodie-Sangster, Kaya Scodelario.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: Ellen prepares for her wedding day; Julia attempts her escape.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: A self-styled Lothario (Ryan Gosling) teaches a suddenly single 40-something (Steve Carell) how to be a hit with the ladies. Starring Steve Carell, Ryan Gosling, Julianne Moore.

programme.title: Hector and the Search for Happiness
programme.desc: A search by a disillusioned psychiatrist for the key to his happiness takes him around the world on a journey. Starring Simon Pegg, Toni Collette, Rosamund Pike.

programme.title: Diamond Tongues
programme.desc: Edith dreams of being a successful actress, but cannot land any roles. When she cant figure out what she is doing wrong, she starts to mess everything up. Starring Leah Fay Goldstein, Nick Flanagan, Adam Gurfinkel.

programme.title: Indian Horse
programme.desc: A Canadian First Nations boy survives in a residential school in the 1970s. Starring Sladen Peltier, Forrest Goodluck, Ajuawak Kapashesit.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The Five, led by Magnus, attempt to find the secret labyrinth in the decimated city of Bhalasaam; once located, they must complete a series of cryptic tests that can only be achieved using each of their unique powers.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The search for Ashley puts Magnus, Will, Druitt and Tesla in the path of Kate Freelander, a con artist with ties to the Cabal who divulges the location of a secret facility.

programme.title: Clara
programme.desc: In a race to find intelligent life in the universe, an astronomer and his freethinking research assistant make an inexplicable discovery that changes how they see the world -- and each other. Starring Patrick J. Adams, Troian Bellisario, Kristen Hager.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: A dashing rooster and the hen he loves lead an escape from a farm in 1950s England. Starring Mel Gibson, Julia Sawalha, Miranda Richardson.

programme.title: Wallace and Gromit: The Curse of the Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: Pest controllers Wallace and Gromit must save the day when a vegetable-munching beast ravages town gardens. Starring Peter Sallis, Ralph Fiennes, Helena Bonham Carter.

programme.title: Kayak to Klemtu
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl readies for a kayak trip along the shores of the Great Bear rainforest with her family to protest oil tanker traffic. Starring Evan Adams, Jared Ager-Foster, Carmel Amit.

programme.title: The Imaginarium of Dr Parnassus
programme.desc: After a carnival troupe saves his life, a man (Heath Ledger) agrees to help its immortal leader (Christopher Plummer) collect five souls and win a bet with the devil. Starring Heath Ledger, Christopher Plummer, Verne Troyer.

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: A thief (Leonardo DiCaprio) who enters peoples dreams and steals their secrets gets a shot at redemption when he is given the dangerous task of planting an idea in someones subconscious. Starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Joseph Gordon-Levitt, Elliot Page.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
programme.desc: An Indiana lineman (Richard Dreyfuss) and other UFO-sighters, beleaguered by earlier incidents, finally have documented contact with space aliens. Starring Richard Dreyfuss, François Truffaut, Teri Garr.

programme.title: Spaceballs
programme.desc: President Skroob (Mel Brooks) pits evil Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) against Lone Starr and the half-man, half-dog Barf (John Candy). Starring Mel Brooks, John Candy, Rick Moranis.

programme.title: No Mans Land
programme.desc: While on a reconnaissance mission, Anna rescues a young girl who was sold as a slave; in Texas, a young teacher suspects that her ex-boyfriend has joined ISIS.

programme.title: No Mans Land
programme.desc: In an attempt to recruit Nisrin to the YPJ, Anna begins giving her military training; Nasser befriends Jake, the head of ISIS financial committee and acquires vital intelligence about him.

programme.title: Eighteen
programme.desc: A young man (Paul Anthony) forges new relationships after listening to the World War II stories of his grandfather. Starring Brendan Fletcher, Carly Pope, Mark Hildreth.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: Singer David Bowie reinvents himself as Ziggy Stardust while touring America to promote his new album "The Man Who Sold the World." Starring Johnny Flynn, Jena Malone, Marc Maron.

programme.title: The Big Heat
programme.desc: When his investigation into a corrupt cops suicide spawns a car bombing that takes the life of his wife, Police Sergeant Dave Bannion quits the force to pursue the case on his own. Starring Glenn Ford, Gloria Grahame, Jocelyn Brando.

programme.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
programme.desc: A widowed lawyer (Gregory Peck) with two bright children (Mary Badham, Phillip Alford) defends a black man falsely accused of raping a white woman in 1930s Alabama. Starring Gregory Peck, Mary Badham, Phillip Alford.

programme.title: Spellbound
programme.desc: A female psychiatrist (Ingrid Bergman) interprets an amnesiac murder suspects (Gregory Peck) surreal dream. Starring Ingrid Bergman, Gregory Peck, Michael Chekhov.

programme.title: Gentlemans Agreement
programme.desc: A journalist (Gregory Peck) moves to New York City and poses as a Jew to experience anti-Semitism for a magazine article. Starring Gregory Peck, Dorothy McGuire, John Garfield.

programme.title: The Yearling
programme.desc: A pet deer changes a boy (Claude Jarman Jr.) and his parents (Gregory Peck, Jane Wyman), pioneering farmers in Florida after the Civil War. Starring Gregory Peck, Jane Wyman, Claude Jarman.

programme.title: The Valley of Decision
programme.desc: A steel tycoons (Donald Crisp) son (Gregory Peck) loves the family maid, an Irish steelworkers daughter (Greer Garson), in late-1800s Pittsburgh. Starring Greer Garson, Gregory Peck, Donald Crisp.

programme.title: Miracles for Sale
programme.desc: A maker (Robert Young) of illusions for magicians protects an ingenue (Florence Rice) likely to be murdered. Starring Robert Young, Florence Rice, Frank Craven.

programme.title: Mark of the Vampire
programme.desc: An elderly criminologist devises a unique scheme to unmask the killer behind a series of gruesome murders. Starring Lionel Barrymore, Bela Lugosi, Elizabeth Allan.

programme.title: Tarzan, the Ape Man
programme.desc: An English colonels daughter (Joanna Barnes) meets a lord (Denny Miller) of the jungle who makes her his mate. Starring Denny Miller, Joanna Barnes, Cesare Danova.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: The wolf chases down three little pigs.

programme.title: The Opposite Sex
programme.desc: Catty Park Avenue women teach a friend (June Allyson) how to win her husband back from a sexpot (Joan Collins). Starring June Allyson, Joan Collins, Dolores Gray.

programme.title: Oliver Twist
programme.desc: Dickens London waif (John Howard Davies) is pressed into Fagins (Alec Guinness) street gang led by bully Bill Sikes (Robert Newton) and the Artful Dodger. Starring Robert Newton, Alec Guinness, John Davies.

programme.title: Oh, God!
programme.desc: God comes to Earth as an elderly man (George Burns) with a twinkle and picks a supermarket produce manager (John Denver) to spread his word. Starring George Burns, John Denver, Teri Garr.

programme.title: Life Achievement Award: 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Celebrating 50 years of the AFI Life Achievement Award with archival clips and interviews.

programme.title: Fat City
programme.desc: A young fighter (Jeff Bridges) inspires a boozing ex-boxer (Stacy Keach) working as a fruit picker to try a comeback. Starring Stacy Keach, Jeff Bridges, Susan Tyrrell.

programme.title: Inside Moves
programme.desc: A man (John Savage) paralyzed by a suicide attempt meets an injured basketball player (David Morse) and other regulars at a bar. Starring John Savage, David Morse, Diana Scarwid.

programme.title: Drunken Angel
programme.desc: Akira Kurosawas postwar allegory focusing on an alcoholic doctors determination to cure a gangster of tuberculosis. Starring Toshiro Mifune, Takashi Shimura, Reizaburo Yamamoto.

programme.title: Crossing Delancey
programme.desc: A Manhattan single (Amy Irving) meets a man (Peter Riegert) through her Jewish grandmothers (Reizl Bozyk) matchmaker. Starring Amy Irving, Reizl Bozyk, Peter Riegert.

programme.title: Metropolitan
programme.desc: A West Side loner gets a taste of high society when he becomes involved with a group of privileged young Manhattanites. Starring Carolyn Farina, Edward Clements, Chris Eigeman.

programme.title: Hercules, Samson and Ulysses
programme.desc: Hercules (Kirk Morris) and Samson (Richard Lloyd) fight each other, then team up with Ulysses (Enzo Cerusico) against a tyrant. Starring Kirk Morris, Richard Lloyd, Enzo Cerusico.

programme.title: Helen of Troy
programme.desc: Menelaus and Agamemnon lead their Greek hordes against peaceful Troy to recapture the kidnapped queen (Rossana Podesta). Starring Rossana Podesta, Jack Sernas, Cedric Hardwicke.

programme.title: Drunken Angel

programme.title: Strange Lady in Town
programme.desc: A 19th-century doctor meets with public resistance when she tries to establish a medical practice in Santa Fe. Starring Greer Garson, Dana Andrews, Cameron Mitchell.

programme.title: Great Expectations
programme.desc: Dickens orphan Pip (John Mills) goes to London to become a gentleman, thanks to his anonymous benefactor. Starring John Mills, Valerie Hobson, Bernard Miles.

programme.title: Nothing Sacred
programme.desc: A circulation-hungry newspaper brings a terminally ill Vermont woman to New York as a publicity stunt. Starring Carole Lombard, Fredric March, Charles Winninger.

programme.title: Ill Cry Tomorrow
programme.desc: 1930s singer/actress Lillian Roth (Susan Hayward) hits bottom after bad marriages, then joins Alcoholics Anonymous. Starring Susan Hayward, Richard Conte, Eddie Albert.

programme.title: The Searchers
programme.desc: A Confederate veteran and his part-Cherokee partner search five years for a kidnapped girl. Starring John Wayne, Jeffrey Hunter, Natalie Wood.

programme.title: The Postman Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: A drifter (John Garfield) stops at a Greek diner and helps the owners (Cecil Kellaway) lusty wife (Lana Turner) become a widow. Starring Lana Turner, John Garfield, Cecil Kellaway.

programme.title: Charley Chase Silent Shorts
programme.desc: Newspaperman Charley pretends to be his exact double to please an old lady hoping to see her son again; little does Charley realize his doppelganger is wanted as a notorious criminal.

programme.title: Forgotten Sweeties
programme.desc: When a mans ex-girlfriend moves into his building with her new husband, the mans wife is not happy about the situation. Starring Charley Chase, Anita Garvin, Mitchell Lewis.

programme.title: Charley Chase Silent Shorts
programme.desc: Charley is mistaken for a jewel thief by a socialite who tries to entrap him at a society party.

programme.title: Anna and the Wolves
programme.desc: A foreign governess named Ana arrives at an isolated home to take charge of the education of the children of the family that lives in the mansion. Starring Geraldine Chaplin, Fernando Fernán Gomez, Jose María Prada.

programme.title: Cría cuervos
programme.desc: A little girl (Ana Torrent) and her sisters are placed with an aunt (Geraldine Chaplin) in Madrid after their father dies during adultery. Starring Ana Torrent, Geraldine Chaplin, Monica Randall.

programme.title: Queen of Outer Space
programme.desc: Astronauts attempt to thwart a plot to destroy Earth when they land on Venus and are captured by angry Amazons. Starring Zsa Zsa Gabor, Eric Fleming, Laurie Mitchell.

programme.title: Satellite in the Sky
programme.desc: A bomb dooms the first space satellite, manned by a selfless crew, a stowaway reporter (Lois Maxwell) and a mad scientist (Donald Wolfit). Starring Kieron Moore, Lois Maxwell, Donald Wolfit.

programme.title: The Black Scorpion
programme.desc: Two geologists (Richard Denning, Carlos Rivas) try to destroy a giant scorpion that surfaces after a volcanic eruption in Mexico. Starring Richard Denning, Mara Corday, Carlos Rivas.

programme.title: The Beast From 20,000 Fathoms

programme.title: Forbidden Planet

programme.desc: A shady singer lures a star-struck teen to a faraway island with promises of fame and fortune. But when it turns out to be a sex-trafficking ring, her desperate mother embarks on a daring crusade to save her. Starring Gina Holden, Mozart Dee, Aaron Schwartz.

programme.title: Eve of Abduction
programme.desc: When a single mother becomes engaged, she receives an anonymous threat -- either break off the engagement or her daughter will be kidnapped. Starring Sarah Lind, Robb Derringer, Braeden Carl.

programme.title: Amber Alert
programme.desc: A rideshare becomes a high-stakes game of cat and mouse when Jaq and Shane receive an Amber Alert on their phones. When they spot the kidnappers car with the girl in the back seat, they desperately race against time to save her before its too late. Starring Hayden Panettiere, Tyler James Williams, Kevin Dunn.

programme.title: Vanished in an Instant
programme.desc: Megans teenage daughter, Whitney, disappears after their car breaks down at a gas station. As a shadowy figure traps Whitney in a deadly game of survival, Megan scrambles to uncover the truth before shes lost forever. Starring Vinessa Antoine, Arista Arhin, Aaron Poole.

programme.title: Aliens Abducted My Parents and Now I Feel Kinda Left Out
programme.desc: High school journalist Itsy befriends her space-obsessed neighbor Calvin. After he convinces her that his parents were abducted by aliens, together they concoct a plan to get them back. Starring Emma Tremblay, Jacob Buster, Will Forte.

programme.title: Vanished in an Instant
programme.desc: Megans teenage daughter, Whitney, disappears after their car breaks down at a gas station. As a shadowy figure traps Whitney in a deadly game of survival, Megan scrambles to uncover the truth before shes lost forever. Starring Vinessa Antoine, Arista Arhin, Aaron Poole.

programme.title: Missing From Fire Trail Road
programme.desc: A documentary detailing the case of Mary Ellen Johnson-Davis, a Native American woman who disappeared in 2020. Her story exposes how hundreds of indigenous women continue to go missing in the USA, perpetuating trans-generational traumas.

programme.title: Barber
programme.desc: A wealthy widow hires private investigator Val Barber to find her missing granddaughter. As dark secrets start to surface, Barber finds himself entangled with shady and powerful men who are determind to thwart his investigation. Starring Aidan Gillen, Aisling Kearns, Gary Lydon.

programme.title: The Last Video Store
programme.desc: A cursed VHS tape unleashes classic cinematic villains into the real world. Starring Kevin Martin, Yaayaa Adams, Matthew Kennedy.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A quiet Tennessee couple returns home to a nightmare, burglars lurking in the shadows, a home invasion turning deadly.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Sydney Loofes vibrant life takes a tragic turn in November 2017 when she enters the world of online dating and unknowingly crosses paths with Bailey Boswell and Aubrey Trail; as their second date approaches, the couple hatches a sinister plan.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Denita Smith, a 25-year-old graduate student in North Carolina, is murdered on January 4, 2007; before her tragic death, Shannon Crawley, who had a complicated history with Denitas fiance, Jermeir Stroud, became extremely jealous.

programme.title: Know Her Name
programme.desc: Delving into the legacy of filmmakers and uncovers the mystery of why women, especially from underrepresented communities - like Zora Neale Hurston and Esther Eng were - have been erased through historical amnesia.

programme.title: If I Cant Have You
programme.desc: Disc jockey Michelle Hall attracts the amorous attention of an unknown, demented fan. Meanwhile, back at home, her nosy neighbor seems to watch and know every move she makes. Starring Jackee Harry, Bailey Kai, Gina Hiraizumi.

programme.title: A Chefs Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: A woman moves to a new town and opens her own gourmet restaurant after escaping from an abusive relationship. However, she soon finds herself in a deadly game of cat and mouse when she becomes the target of constant harassment from a jealous man. Starring Kathryn Kohut, Tomas Chovanec, Chelsea Muirhead.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Sydney Loofes vibrant life takes a tragic turn in November 2017 when she enters the world of online dating and unknowingly crosses paths with Bailey Boswell and Aubrey Trail; as their second date approaches, the couple hatches a sinister plan.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Denita Smith, a 25-year-old graduate student in North Carolina, is murdered on January 4, 2007; before her tragic death, Shannon Crawley, who had a complicated history with Denitas fiance, Jermeir Stroud, became extremely jealous.

programme.title: Seduced by His Lies
programme.desc: Terri returns from an extended trip to find a mysterious yet captivating stranger living in her recently purchased home. Believing theyve been scammed, they team up to expose the criminals, only to uncover a chilling labyrinth of lies and deception. Starring Lauren Lee Smith, Christopher Russell.

programme.title: The Lie: The Murder of Grace Millane
programme.desc: The headline-grabbing murder of 21-year-old British backpacker Grace Millane while on a solo holiday in New Zealand.

programme.title: Know Her Name
programme.desc: Delving into the legacy of filmmakers and uncovers the mystery of why women, especially from underrepresented communities - like Zora Neale Hurston and Esther Eng were - have been erased through historical amnesia.

programme.title: If I Cant Have You
programme.desc: Disc jockey Michelle Hall attracts the amorous attention of an unknown, demented fan. Meanwhile, back at home, her nosy neighbor seems to watch and know every move she makes. Starring Jackee Harry, Bailey Kai, Gina Hiraizumi.

However, she soon finds herself in a deadly game of cat and mouse when she becomes the target of constant harassment from a jealous man. Starring Kathryn Kohut, Tomas Chovanec, Chelsea Muirhead.

programme.title: The Boy That Never Was
programme.desc: Robins behaviour grows more mysterious when she begins to search a woman called Eva Doyle online.

programme.title: Take Cover
programme.desc: Trapped inside a penthouse with little to no cover, a professional sniper must battle an army of thugs to make it out alive. Starring Scott Adkins, Alice Eve, Billy Clements.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Reagan Tokes, a student, disappears, prompting an investigation; her case raises questions about parole and criminal justice.

programme.title: The Boy That Never Was
programme.desc: Robins behaviour grows more mysterious when she begins to search a woman called Eva Doyle online.

programme.title: Take Cover
programme.desc: Trapped inside a penthouse with little to no cover, a professional sniper must battle an army of thugs to make it out alive. Starring Scott Adkins, Alice Eve, Billy Clements.

programme.title: If I Cant Have You
programme.desc: Disc jockey Michelle Hall attracts the amorous attention of an unknown, demented fan. Meanwhile, back at home, her nosy neighbor seems to watch and know every move she makes. Starring Jackee Harry, Bailey Kai, Gina Hiraizumi.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: When bank employee Theodore Conrad casually walks off his job carrying hundreds of thousands of dollars in a paper bag, a fifty-two year manhunt ensues; two federal marshals and a father and son duo manage to close the case.

programme.title: Charmed to Death
programme.desc: A single father finally finds a love he can grow old with; but just months after theyve wed, his retirement savings are depleted, and he learns hes only the latest in a string of victims; when he files for divorce, things get much worse.

programme.title: Targeted for Murder
programme.desc: In Pensacola, Florida, ex-cop and private investigator, Taylor Wright, is moving into a new home with the love of her life when she inexplicably disappears without a trace; it appears at first as if she may have simply run away.

programme.title: Threats from the Inside
programme.desc: Brad Collins love for his wife, Amy, becomes an all-encompassing obsession, and he grows more and more controlling of her with each passing year. When Brad finds out that Amy had an affair with a colleague, a huge fight ensues and tragedy results. Starring Matt Wells, Sarah Cleveland, Scott Gibson.

programme.title: A Nanny to Die For
programme.desc: A couple hires a nanny for their young daughter and discovers that she has ulterior motives. Starring Brittany Carel, Meredith Thomas, Robert Brian Wilson.

programme.title: The Nanny Sees All
programme.desc: Grace Andersons new job as a nanny for the mayors family turns into a nightmare when a murder rocks the town, and she starts receiving ominous messages. Now, Grace starts to question what deadly secrets are lurking in her hometown. Starring Golden Madison, Julia Borsellino, Lisa Langlois.

programme.title: Match, Meet, Murder
programme.desc: Diving into the world of dating apps, a lingerie designer meets a handsome stranger whos smart, successful, and a former contestant on a dating show. However, she soon learns that the show wasnt the only secret he failed to mention in his profile. Starring Stephanie Sy, Jacob Blair, Erik Athavale.

programme.desc: Two investigators (John Travolta, Madeleine Stowe) find an underworld of sex and cover-ups behind an Army captains murder.

programme.title: The Dead Dont Hurt (2023)
programme.desc: When the man she loves, Holger Olsen, goes off to fight in the Civil War, Vivienne Le Coudy must fend for herself in a place controlled by a corrupt mayor and his unscrupulous business partner.

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: Unhook the Stars (1996)
programme.desc: A suburban widow (Gena Rowlands) fights with a daughter, befriends an abused neighbors (Marisa Tomei) son and gains a truckers (Gerard Depardieu) infatuation.

programme.title: The Friend (2024)
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: Waking Up in Reno (2002)
programme.desc: A married man (Billy Bob Thornton) has an affair with his best friends wife (Charlize Theron) while both couples travel from Arkansas to Nevada.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Diary (2001)
programme.desc: An outrageous British woman (Renee Zellweger) decides to take control of her life, but instead falls for two very different men (Colin Firth, Hugh Grant).

programme.title: Abandon (2002)
programme.desc: A detective (Benjamin Bratt) discovers new facts regarding the disappearance of a collegians (Katie Holmes) boyfriend (Charlie Hunnam) two years earlier.

programme.title: Monstrous (2022)
programme.desc: A terrifying new horror awaits Laura and her 7-year-old son, Cody, when they flee her abusive ex-husband and try to settle into a new life. Still traumatized, their fragile existence is pushed to the breaking point.

programme.title: The Woman in Black (2012)
programme.desc: A widowed lawyer (Daniel Radcliffe) encounters ghostly goings-on at the foreboding estate of a recently deceased client.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victims daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A masked killer continues to pursue a California student (Neve Campbell) and her friends at an Ohio college.

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: Scream 4 (2011)
programme.desc: The Ghostface Killer returns with a vengeance when self-help author Sidney Prescott arrives in Woodsboro on the last stop of her book tour.

programme.title: Asking for It (2022)
programme.desc: A victim of sexual assault joins an all-female gang that targets violent frat boys and a corrupt police force of human traffickers.

programme.title: Backcountry (2014)
programme.desc: A couple (Missy Peregrym, Jeff Roop) on a deep-wilderness hike become hopelessly lost within an aggressive black bears territory.

programme.title: Miles to Go Before I Sleep
programme.desc: The relationships between musicians and their road crews and the importance of the people who work to put shows together.

programme.title: The Evening Star (1996)
programme.desc: A spunky woman (Shirley MacLaine) copes with her troubled adult grandchildren, feuds with an enemy and has a fling with a younger man (Bill Paxton).

programme.title: Alone in Berlin (2016)
programme.desc: A German couple lose their son in WWII, prompting them to become secretly anti-Nazi.

programme.title: Atlantic City (1980)
programme.desc: A boardwalk numbers runner (Burt Lancaster) feels young again with a casino clam shucker (Susan Sarandon) and a lucky cocaine deal.

programme.title: The First Wives Club (1996)
programme.desc: Three 50-ish college friends (Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton) plot revenge after their husbands dump them for younger women.

programme.title: The Back-up Plan (2010)
programme.desc: A single woman (Jennifer Lopez) meets the man (Alex OLoughlin) of her dreams on the same day she becomes pregnant through artificial insemination.

programme.title: The English Patient (1996)
programme.desc: A Hungarian counts (Ralph Fiennes) fling with a British newlywed leads to tragedy in World War II North Africa.

programme.title: Kate and Leopold (2001)
programme.desc: A Manhattan woman (Meg Ryan) falls in love with the 19th-century Duke of Albany (Hugh Jackman) who has stepped through a time portal.

programme.title: Muriels Wedding (1994)
programme.desc: An Australian social outcast (Toni Collette) moves to Sydney, cares for an ailing friend (Rachel Griffiths) and weds an Olympian needing citizen status.

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins (2016)
programme.desc: In 1940s New York, a man (Hugh Grant) goes to extreme lengths to make sure his wife (Meryl Streep) never finds out that shes an awful opera singer.

programme.title: Shall We Dance? (2004)
programme.desc: A married Chicago attorney (Richard Gere) takes dancing lessons with a beautiful woman (Jennifer Lopez) he saw through a window.

programme.title: Extraordinary Measures (2010)
programme.desc: After his two youngest children contract a fatal disease, a man (Brendan Fraser) joins forces with an unconventional scientist (Harrison Ford) in the hope of finding a cure.

programme.title: Clouds of Sils Maria (2014)
programme.desc: A veteran actress (Juliette Binoche) comes face-to-face with an uncomfortable reflection of herself when she agrees to take part in a revival of the play that launched her career 20 years earlier.

programme.title: The Back-up Plan (2010)
programme.desc: A single woman (Jennifer Lopez) meets the man (Alex OLoughlin) of her dreams on the same day she becomes pregnant through artificial insemination.

programme.title: View From the Top (2003)
programme.desc: A woman (Gwyneth Paltrow) from a small Nevada town makes friends while training to become a flight attendant.

programme.title: Failure to Launch (2006)
programme.desc: The parents of a young man (Matthew McConaughey) who still lives at home hire a beautiful woman (Sarah Jessica Parker) to entice him to finally leave the nest.

programme.title: Rosemarys Baby (1968)
programme.desc: A pregnant womans (Mia Farrow) husband (John Cassavetes) and their satanic neighbors want her baby to be the Antichrist.

programme.title: Last Weekend (2014)
programme.desc: Petty squabbling marks the Memorial Day reunion of an affluent matriarch (Patricia Clarkson) and her dysfunctional family (Chris Mulkey, Zachary Booth).

programme.title: Losing Isaiah (1995)
programme.desc: An ex-crack addict (Halle Berry) fights for custody of her son adopted by a social worker (Jessica Lange) and her husband (David Strathairn).

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renee Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.
